description_long: This skateboard features a classic double-kick deck with a black grippy surface on top, likely made from sandpaper-like grip tape. The deck itself is constructed from layered wood, visible at the edges, and has a slightly concave shape for better control. The underside is not visible, but the wheels are a prominent red color and appear to be made of polyurethane, attached to metal trucks. The trucks are mounted in a standard configuration, with the wheels set close to the deck for street use. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. This skateboard is typical for urban environments, suitable for tricks and street skating.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck and red polyurethane wheels, featuring a minimalistic, unadorned design. The trucks are standard and metallic, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black grip-taped deck and both red wheels.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck and the rounded nose, with the grip tape surface visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the deck and red wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the tail, showing the deck's width and rounded end, with grip tape visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard metallic trucks, silver color, standard mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
